subcodes.first_line: O learned one in the school of composition and nightingale of the eternal rose garden, although outwardly you are distant from the gathering and absent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان انشاء و عندلیب گلستان ابداع هر چند بظاهر دور از انجمنی و غائب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @East and West; communication between East and West, @the power of words; of speech, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
